official_announcements.content: SoDEX v3 is LIVE! Experience the Upgrade We are back online and faster than ever! The SoDEX v3 upgrade was successfully completed at 7:00 UTC. What’s New in v3: - Enhanced Stability: Smoother block production even during peak, volatile sessions . - Higher Throughput: Increased API limits to support higher concurrent trading volume . - Resume Trading: All Spot and Perp markets are now fully operational. A Heartfelt Thank You and a special shout-out to our "OG" testers who have been with us since the early days. This v3 milestone belongs to all of us. Log in now to experience the new standard of decentralized trading. Trade Now: https://t.co/UrOjlrJbk3 SoDEX Team April 20, 2026

SoDEX v3 Upgrade in Progress The SoDEX v3 mainnet upgrade is ongoing! Our engineering team is currently deploying the new core logic to further enhance block production stability and expand API capacity. Status: Mainnet Upgrade in Progress. Web Access: All non-trading pages are LIVE and accessible. Positions: Safe and monitored.During the upgrade, mark prices will not be updated and liquidations will not occur.  However, when the network upgrade is completed, mark prices will be updated to the latest and positions may be liquidated if the market has moved against them during the window. Users are encouraged to review their positions carefully prior to the upgrade and take actions as necessary.  If you still have an open position when the upgrade starts, please return to SoDEX and monitor the position as soon as the upgrade is completed. Stay tuned for further updates.  Thank you for your patience as we upgrade  the engine to power  a faster, stronger SoDEX! SoDEX Team April 20, 2026
